content:
• Forces students to synthesize information instead of passively analyzing.

📜 3. The Final Literary Boss Gauntlet – The “Mythic Reckoning”

📜 Instead of a single boss (e.g., Cerberus), students now face a scaffolded boss gauntlet where they must overcome multiple figures.

✔ Each student faces a different boss based on their archetype & XP level.
✔ Some bosses can be bypassed using hidden Easter eggs (e.g., the “dog treat” method).
✔ Each boss represents a unique challenge—literary analysis, debate, creativity, or logic.

Example: The Final Gauntlet – “The Reckoning of the Literary Gods”
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 222 (chunk 222/555)
